# Davin Gahisan Mustafid - Full Site Content

This is a comprehensive summary of Davin Gahisan Mustafid's portfolio and blog.

## About
Davin is a fanatical frontend engineer and design engineer at NLFTs. He designs intuitive and efficient interfaces.

## Expertise
- Next.js
- Nuxt.js
- Frontend Engineering
- UI/UX Design
